_comment: A/B model routing experiments (R4). Opt-in: active:false default. To start an experiment, set active:true and run `python scripts/eval/ab_rotator.py --advance-all` periodically (or via cron/timer). The rotator flips the subagent frontmatter model between champion (phase A) and challenger (phase B) every phase_size invocations. The PostToolUse hook tags each event with ab_phase. Run `python scripts/eval/ab_report.py --list` to see status. See docs/protocols/ab-routing.md (if present) or scripts/eval/ab_routing.py docstring.

experiments.reason: compare DeepSeek reasoning vs GLM on clinical tasks (Thai-strong GLM may win on Thai-heavy clinical prompts)
